heading: Exportation of firearms exempt from transfer tax
label: 5854 Exportation of firearms exempt from transfer tax
text: A firearm may be exported without payment of the transfer tax imposed under section 5811 provided that proof of the exportation is furnished in such form and manner as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5854, , , , related to failure to register and pay special tax, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .
